name: Margaret Rose
description:
[color=pink]Thanks for the 5k views, everybody! It's been an amazing 6 months so far, and I plan to stick around for many more!
[/color]
[collapse=Appearance] In body, Margaret's current form is a red furred Kitsune with digitigrade feet. Some parts of her fur are a pinker tone, such as the tuffs in her ears and on her chest and belly, where typical foxes would be white. Aside from those locations, though, the rest of her body is covered in red. She currently has relatively short hair that doesn't usually reach her shoulders, but every now and again if she hasn't trimmed in a while it'll extend down below them.

Her curves are decently sized. Without anything being applied, Margaret's bust measures in right around a D-cup. Down below, though, she is far more gifted with a bottom heavy figure, with hips that extend about two inches beyond her shoulders. Her ass is just as endowed as her hips.

For clothing, Margaret wears a peculiar outfit. Her top is traditionally a lime green that stands out considerably, regardless of if it's a t-shirt or her usual dress. On her legs, her lower wear is traditionally brown women's jeans that hug her hips tightly. On her feet she wears purple Mary Janes. Upon her right hand she wears 3 rings, one yellow, one red, and one blue. These rings are thin bands but are made of magically enhanced metals for increased durability and resilience. These clothes aren't just for show, though, as they are enchanted to boost Margaret's speed to unprecedented levels for any normal person. When going at top speed, she can run down a highway perfectly legally and keep pace with the cars for the most part. She's typically able to run at speeds up to 50 MPH (80.5 KmH) when she really needs to, but said speeds tend to tire her out incredibly quickly. On average when she's wanting to get somewhere, she'll stick to a much slower 25-30 MPH (40-48 KmH).

[collapse=Forms]Naturally, Margaret has had a lot of forms over her time learning magic. Listed here are her 4 main forms, one of which is retired.
[collapse=Human]Your average everyday Margaret. She typically only uses this form when she goes back home so as to not reveal to her parents that she knows magic, as she is from a non-magic world. In this form, she's much the same, red hair, green eyes, but without the fur she's got some lightly tanned skin. Her proportions are the same, along with all of her other forms.[/collapse]
[collapse=Fox Girl]Take Human Margaret, and add in some orange fox ears and a fluffy, orange fox tail.[/collapse]
[collapse=Kitsune]The form you'll typically see her in, described earlier on already.[/collapse]
[collapse=Angel Kitsune]Take Margaret's Kitsune form, now add a brilliant, yellow halo above her head that's as wide as the main part of it, then add two angel wings that are just as big as her to her back. This is her real current form, but she keeps the wings and halo hidden away to keep things from being confusing.[/collapse][/collapse]
[/collapse]

[collapse=Abilities]
Margaret has considerable skill with many different magics, though there are a few that she can be considered an 'Expert' or 'Master' in.
[collapse=Body Shaping][eicon]growth sigil[/eicon][eicon]shrink sigil[/eicon][eicon]add sigil[/eicon][eicon]poly sigil[/eicon]
Exactly as it reads on the tin. She can help someone manipulate their body in whatever way they'd like. Want to go up a few cup sizes? Easily done. Perhaps wanting an extra size or two on your backside? Done and done. Maybe some muscle, or height, or whatever else you can think of? She can probably do it, or at least give it her best shot to try and make it happen![/collapse]
[collapse=Neuromagic][eicon]neuro sigil[/eicon]
Quite possibly the single branch of magic she has the most expertise with. She is capable of making anybody feel anything anywhere on their body, assuming they have nerves or equivalent inside of them. She can make people feel like they're holding stones, cupping water, fighting against a stiff breeze, anything you can think of. From the softest touches like being tickled with a feather to feeling like you're being crushed by literal tons of rocks, she can make you feel it. In addition, Neuromagic can allow her to manipulate people's emotions, making them joyous, nervous, angry, scared, and more! Finally, the most powerful technique she can use with it is changing people's senses. She could make you see, hear, taste, smell and/or touch anything she wants you to. She refers to this as her 'Virtual Reality', and is very willing to bring anybody interested into it.[/collapse]
[collapse=Libdimancy][eicon]libdi sigil[/eicon]
The magic of manipulating Libido and orgasms. A simple touch of this magic, and she can make you hornier than you've ever been before, more pent up than someone who's been edging their entire life, and turn you into a literal geyser of your fluids. To say she's made a few messes with this is an understatement![/collapse]
[collapse=MetaMagic][eicon]meta sigil[/eicon]
This is quite possibly her most powerful, if most volatile, magic. She can alter the meta-data of others she meets with, changing all kinds of stats that most people wouldn't even be able to touch. Things like power and luck, override genetics to change how physical activity affects you, practically anything beyond normal statistics. She mostly just uses it to power people up, though.
One big drawback of MetaMagic, though, is that she cannot use it on herself with any kind of permanence. She was able to use it on herself for mere seconds at a time to ensure their safety, but that's about it.[/collapse]
[collapse=Modifiers]Now, what's some magic without some logic? She's researched many different modifiers to apply to her spells to change how and when they function, and can apply them with ease. From making spells activate with keywords or motions, to delaying when they work or making them work retroactively, she can modify them to the wishes of whoever it's being put on.[/collapse]
[collapse=Enchantments]Her clothes have many enchantments on them, mostly to enhance her speed and magical capacity, but there are a few of more interesting note. The most versatile is that her rings are enchanted to allow her to communicate with others regardless of their size. No matter how big someone gets, in 99% of cases they will be able to understand her, and she'll be able to understand them.[/collapse]
[collapse=Wish Granting]From a slightly misunderstood wish with a genie, or more rather the genie not wanting to go halfway with the wish, Margaret has the ability to grant wishes. She doesn't particularly like to use this ability though, so it might be a bit difficult to convince her to do use it.
[collapse=Wishes Granted]
I'll be putting any big wishes granted here, things that could profoundly change characters and such.

Scarlet Carnation: In Micro/Macro, Scarlet made a wish to be a 9 tailed kitsune with the ability to change forms and use growth magic. The wish granted gave her all 9 tails and said growth magic. As for the ability to change forms, she now has the knowledge on how to change her species and appearance at will, along with the ability to return to her more mundane fox form with just enough magic to return to her kitsune form. In addition, she made another quick wish to be bustier, and ended up a bit more than twice as busty.

Gene Zeta: A big wish in Micro/Macro, he wished to have complete control over his size and his form. In addition, he wished for the ability to use magic, so he now has access to all the spells I do, except MetaMagic.[/collapse]
[/collapse]
[collapse=title]Repulse: After being bitten by a strange lizard, after having been convinced to do so by a trusted friend, Margaret developed this ability. She can draw it out at will, causing two goat skulls to pop out of her hands. Anything she aims at can be blasted backwards as high speeds. In example, a 5 foot wide, 8 foot tall, and 1 foot thick, 40 cubic feet, wall of sandstone was blasted at speeds fast enough to cause it to fly clear over a city over the course of a few seconds. That's over 2 and a half tons that she can just fling anywhere. Though, due to a fear that she developed while she was 4 or 5, she really, REALLY dislikes looking at her hands while using this ability, causing her accuracy to suffer.

Doing the math on this ability, Margaret can push up to 2300 tons of force with this ability under normal circumstances.
[/collapse]

[/collapse]

[collapse=Backstory]Margaret grew up on a non-magic world. Constantly shown how magic was nothing but illusion and sleight of hand, she still held to her beliefs that magic was real. She shunned those who wouldn't let her believe, including her own parents. Then, one day, she got a lucky break. While looking online for proof of magic, she stumbled across a website for a magic school. Wasting no time, she put the address into her navigation and went there, desperate to prove that magic was real beyond a shadow of a doubt. And boy did she learn! Not too long after she had joined the school, she had already completed the basic classes and ravenously scoured all the books she could to learn everything she could. This was only further enabled by her happenstance of finding a Sleep Efficiency spell that allowed her to sleep 8 hours in a single minute. She devoured any book she could find that had new spells for her to try, and culminated them all into a single notebook. Though, said notebook ended up taller than her by a good foot, and at least the width of two of her. And still, she looks to hone her craft and to learn more magic, to try and push the boundaries of what's possible.[/collapse]

[collapse=Arcane Trinkets and Devices]Margaret has come across many different trinkets and devices in her time, and has amassed quite a few of them herself. Some she was gifted, others she bought, and a few she's made.
[collapse=Extradimensional Storage Handbag]A small handbag that was won in a bet. Its interior is roughly a 10 foot cube. She tends to store lots of stuff in it, including but not limited to her gargantuan notebook, other arcane devices, and a ton of other stuff. If it's something mundane like rings and such, she'll probably have it in here.[/collapse]
[collapse=Physical Protection Talisman]One device of her own creation is the Physical Protection Talisman. Taking the appearance of a simple talisman while inactive, it can quickly create a transparent, orange barrier around the user to protect them from many physical threats, such as crushing and flooding. Though, it does have a limit to how much and how long it'll last.[/collapse]
[collapse=Power Bracelet]A device bought from a friend, this bracelet, when worn, multiplies the user's power by 15 times. It doesn't have the same secondary effects of Margaret's own Power Boosting spell, but it can save the trouble of using it 4 times over.[/collapse]
[collapse=Switch Switch]Another bought device, this one, when pointed at someone, can change how dominant or submissive they are. It's just a simple 3 setting switch. Though, if not pointed at someone, it can be flipped up or down, then pointed at someone to make them more dominant or submissive.[/collapse]
[collapse=Remote]Yet another bought device, this little thing looks like a normal remote, but can actually change things about people. It can change their size, their cup size, the size of their ass and hips, the size of their muscles, give others a sudden dose of arousal, and even keep the person from feeling the effects until a button is pressed. Quite the versatile little tool, all things considered.[/collapse]
[collapse=Rewrite Pen]The last of the bought devices, this pen allows one to write something on someone else, and have that take effect on the person. In example, if one were to write 'Dominant' on someone, that person would become much more dominant. The pen can be washed off or crossed off to negate the effects.[/collapse]
[collapse=Revival Talisman]The ultimate in pride, Margaret has a talisman that can transcend life and death itself. As long as it is within contact of someone who dies in any way but old age, it will revive them next to their bed within 24 hours. If you need a visual of it, they'll basically respawn like in Minecraft, just suddenly poofing into existence next to where they last slept.[/collapse]
[collapse=Storage Bottles]Designed and made by Margaret, specifically for the purpose of storing massive amounts of fluids, usually those made by an orgasming macro. They come in varying internal sizes, going from containing a small pond to entire oceans. Margaret simply says an arcane word to one and it activates to absorb what is needed.[/collapse][/collapse]

[collapse=Major Drawbacks]Of course, power comes with a price. Margaret might not have many things considered as drawbacks, but there is one major one as of yet.
[collapse=Pleasure Limitations][s]Margaret cannot feel pleasure anywhere below her belly button, and anywhere else it is muted, as if mostly asleep. This has been her curse since a few months after entering the school, after she accidentally overloaded her nerves with pleasure from an untested pleasure spell. Since that day, she hasn't been able to feel much of anything when it comes to carnal satisfaction, and must resort to Libdimancy to make herself orgasm when she feels the need. She wears this curse with pride, though. It's a reminder to never go too far if you're unwilling to deal with the consequences.[/s]

Update! Thanks to a wish and a fun night from [icon]Scootledoo Whimsy[/icon], Margaret's pleasure limitations have been undone! Mostly. In general, I will play her with her ability to feel pleasure, but in some rooms I will still play it as if she can't still. Plus, any RPs that were started before this change will be played the exact same. Also, have patience with this change, ok? Gonna take me a while to change habits.[/collapse][/collapse]

[collapse=Art Note]My profile image if borrowed art from Battle Mage Royal. If anybody from BMR requests I remove it, I will do so.[/collapse]

[collapse=Randomized Spell][eicon]rando sigil[/eicon]
To start, figure out the maximum size you're wanting your character. After that, divide that number by the height of your character in feet, rounded up. Roll a number of dice equal to the height in feet with a number of sides equal to the number you calculated. For numbers that don't work with the die roller in F-Chat, remove zeros from the number until it works, then add them back to the final result. That will be the height, in feet, your character grows to.
Example with Margaret: 5'8", so it gets rounded to 6 feet. I'll say the max height I want is 600 feet, for easy math. I would roll then 6d100.

The next step is to decide how many extra modifiers you want. You can choose anywhere from 1 to 5, then roll a 1dX for each one, replacing X with the number of options listed below. If an option has another choice, roll again for them. Roll until you reach your desired number of extras. This list can and probably will be updated as new ideas flow in.

[collapse=1: More Curves]1: More Tits
2:More Ass
3:More Hips[/collapse]

2: Grow some Muscles
[collapse=3: Addition of Naughty Bits]
1: Extra set of Tits
2: Extra set of Cock and Balls[/collapse]
[collapse=4: X Breath]Replace X with one of the following:
1: Fire
2: Ice
3: Lightning[/collapse]
[collapse=5: Claw Sharpness]
1: Dull
2: Sharp
3: Finely tuned
4: Incredibly Sharp
5: Can Cut Through Steel
6: Can’t be stopped[/collapse]
6: Increased Strength
[collapse=7: Wings]
1: Demonic
2: Angelic
3: Bird
4: Draconic
5: Fairy
6: Pixie[/collapse]
[collapse=8: Less Curves]1: Less Tits
2:Less Ass
3:Less Hips[/collapse]
9: Bigger Cock and Balls
10: Smaller Cock and Balls
11: 1d4 Extra Tails
[collapse=12: Species Shift]
1: Dog
2: Feline
3: Horse
4: Dragon
5: Angel
6: Demon
7: Kitsune
8: Vulpine
9: Bird
10: Raptor
11: Cow
12: Sheep
13: Wolf
14: Shark (Can breathe on land.)
15: Bunny/Rabbit
16: Human
17: Mouse/Rat[/collapse]
13: Snake Tail
14: Taurification
15: Lactation
16: Arousal Boost

[collapse=Ideas in Contention]
foot type: Paws, claws, hooves, and more
Plantigrade vs Digitigrade [/collapse]
[/collapse]

[collapse=Diseases at School]
Margaret's School isn't just filled with magical students, it's also got some magic diseases. These are the currently known ones.
Hucow Virus: Causes the infected person's tits to grow and lactate. Men are immune but can carry it.
Growitis: Causes the infected person to sneeze and grow. The more spurts, the bigger the growth.[/collapse]

[collapse=Room Stuff]
[collapse=Micro/Macro]
Thanks to a certain Cat Goddess, the magic in Micro/Macro has been increased! Now the upper limit is 1000 feet per second.
[collapse=Fear of Growing]Margaret will be super careful if she's big and probably won't do too much with it, but she's fine with getting bigger, usually. She just won't grow by herself or for herself, as she always wants someone with her.[/collapse][/collapse]
[collapse=Size Games]Got my own room up and running now! Feel free to come on by to Size Games to have a quick game or two with a bit of size changing![/collapse][/collapse]

[collapse=Beginner Drawer]I've been working on getting into drawing some. If you have something relatively simple that you wouldn't mind a novice taking a crack at to try sketching, feel free to ask. I could use all the practice I can get.
[collapse=Sketches Being Worked On][/collapse]
[collapse=Sketches Done!]Emily the Dragoncat: A bunny version of herself, with tits bigger than her head and a sizable package. [url=https://www.furaffinity.net/view/43040569/]Image Location.[/url]
Boesch Annisa: The character a bit thicker, in a coverall, with extra pockets, a bit patchy, a tool belt, and maybe a few belt pouches. [url=https://www.furaffinity.net/view/43049944/]Image Location.[/url][/collapse][/collapse]

[collapse=Extra Thing]Might be trying to get in on something new in the near future. It'll be very, very different to Margaret's usual stuff, to the point where the things that I've done in rooms like Micro/Macro wouldn't even be in her wildest fantasies with this canon. No joke, inches are going to be hard enough to come by for this. I'll put the work I have done down for it here to eventually fill into a full thing.
[url=https://docs.google.com/document/d/190vrLKGMhvHaBqIJVKnc_YST1e3vTDiYpu4WyAy9FOQ/edit?usp=sharing]Modified Body Modification[/url]
[url=https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xkqdG9VXExsSucbpvpZoV_RX8YP5sIn7MQs5dv8YSxo/edit]Alternate backstory![/url][/collapse]

40191193.name: (OOC) Need a shoulder?
40191193.description: If you need someone to rant to, shoot me a PM or a note, it never hurts to have someone to vent to!

40070078.name: Joining in
40070078.description: See me having some fun publicly in a room? By all means, join in!

39515389.name: 'I Only Interact With Mutuals'
39515389.description: First of all, if you're saying this, why? You are in a freaking PUBLIC SPACE where people are going to be interacting with you. I don't care who you are, but if you only interact with those you know, why the hell are you not ONLY in DMs? Why be in a channel at all?

38899912.name: Player Nos
38899912.description: Things I don't want to do, period.

38899911.name: Character Nos
38899911.description: Just the things Margaret is against doing, but I am fine with while playing her.

38350035.name: LIFE COMES FIRST! PERIOD!
38350035.description: No matter what is going on, no matter how much fun we're having, no matter the scene, the characters, or the topic, if you need to go, you need to go. Don't hesitate to poof on me or tell me you need to go.

38143811.name: *Slow growth
38143811.description: Fast growth is great, but slowly watching someone grow and grow is best! Watching him/her cope with changing sizes (ex. trying to buy new clothes, cutting doorways larger, etc.) and dealing with the difficulties of being so large in everyday life adds depth between charas and is a lot of fun when done right!

38063196.name: Permanent Effects
38063196.description: Permanent effects, or at least as permanent as can be until you decide to change it up by asking me or someone else, are definitely possible with Margaret. Though, there are a few limitations. She won't make anything permanent the first time through. You need to know what you're getting into before you get the opportunity. And even then, she may choose to not let it be permanent depending on how you're acting. If, however, you fulfill both criteria, you can request any modification to be permanent.

37689998.name: Growth Bursts
37689998.description:
A form of growth that happens in quick bursts rather than one slow and continuous spurt.
Copied from https://www.f-list.net/c/Jennifer%20MacGuire

37600394.name: No Limits, Mostly
37600394.description: I don't have too many limits when it comes to size. But, my hard limit is when it becomes difficult to describe how big you are getting. Beyond Planetary sizes, most people usually can't describe their size, and the growth is lost on me. If you can describe it well, feel free to go as big as you like!

37600393.name: Growth
37600393.description: Yes. If you let me grow you, I will love the RP. Mind you, you do need to actually describe the growth in some way, or let me describe it if you don't feel up to it. You always get first dibs on it, though.

36976408.name: Power Overload
36976408.description: One person increasing the power of another through magical or chemical means. For those with supernatural traits, such as angels, demons, kitsunes, and werewolves, this can amplify those traits. In addition, it can cause someone to grow in some way or another to contain all the power.

infotags.55: A kind person at heart who doesn't want to hurt people.  But, she's always down to have a fun time with people.

images.description: A drawing that I made of Margaret that I'm pretty proud of. Definitely shows a lot of progress that I've made when it comes to being able to draw, and Margaret's appearance too. Still not the best, but I'm getting there. - Now in color!
A 30 minute doodle by my good friend, Draevon! He apparently wanted to do this for a while, and I like how he decided to do her! Give him a round of applause!
My first ever digital drawing of Margaret. Shows off her colors well, huh? It's not the best image ever, but it should give a decent idea of what she looks like.
Not the best drawing ever, but it should give a general idea of what Margaret looks like, sans her tails. Going to need to make another one at some point that shows them too.
